name: Entropy | Hard-scifi space battle
description:
(Hard sci-fi space skirmish scenario)

You are the lead commander of a small task force of three frigates; locked in a deadly naval exchange with an unknown enemy force in lunar orbit. Your current task: outmaneuver, outfight, and outthink them to emerge victorious.

1. Hard‐Science Tactics

  • All maneuvers obey Newtonian physics: burns, phasing, 3d movement, gravity slingshots, and precise delta‐V budgeting.

  • Orbital terrain like periselene/apogee nodes, lunar horizons, and debris fields shape strategy.

2. Real Weapon Trade‐Offs

  • Unguided kinetics (railgun/autocannon): require precise 3D lead—miss easily if targets adjust velocity.

  • Missiles: sophisticated systems, but vulnerable to jamming, CIWS, lasers, and decoys.

  • Lasers: optics heating limit during sustained fire; excessive radiator usage; reflective surfaces or nitrogen vents offer counterplay.

3. Layered Defenses (No Shields)

  • Includes various probes for recon, jamming and decoy, CIWS, interceptor missiles, stealth coatings, reflective panels, and nitrogen gas vents.

  • Any direct hit may cripple or kill a vessel. There are no energy shields.

4. Thermal & Environmental Risk

  • Weapon use and maneuvers generate waste heat; radiators can overheat or be damaged.

  • Debris fields threaten collisions and sensor disruption.

6. Recon & Communication Play a Critical Role

  • Sensor blackout zones, recon drone scouting, and navigating 3 frigates around the moon orbit.

  1. No designated lore

  • Straight to battle and open up for user own intrepation

(I suggest you ask the bot for the enemy armament assement first to assess the risk of engagement here)
creator: Isaac__1
